# Touch Grass

> A free, open-source macOS menu-bar app that watches how much active AI time you rack up and gently makes you take a screen break when you cross your limit. Everything runs locally on your Mac.

Touch Grass lives in the macOS menu bar (no Dock icon). It counts only *active* AI time — time when you are present at an AI app or website, or an AI command-line tool is genuinely working on your behalf in the background. Idle time and unrelated apps do not count. When you cross your chosen limit it gives a one-minute warning, then fills every display with a calm dawn-to-dusk landscape and a countdown until the break ends. A small plant grows while you are away. It is firm but escapable: the break always clears on its own timer, there is no anti-tamper daemon, and you can always quit the app.

## Facts
- Platform: macOS 13 or later (Apple Silicon and Intel)
- Price: free
- License: MIT (open source)
- Privacy: 100% local — no analytics, no account, no servers. The only thing it reads is your browser's active-tab URL, locally, to recognize AI websites (with per-browser macOS permission).
- Detects AI use across: native apps (e.g. Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor), terminal CLIs (e.g. claude, codex, aider, gemini), and AI websites (e.g. chatgpt.com, claude.ai, perplexity.ai)
- Author: Devesh Bhimanpelli

## Pages
- [Home](https://touchgrass.rest/): what it is, and download
- [How it works](https://touchgrass.rest/how-it-works): the detection model, the rolling window, the warning, and the break
- [FAQ](https://touchgrass.rest/faq): is it free, does it track me, how it detects AI, can I skip a break, and more
- [Download](https://touchgrass.rest/download): requirements and install steps
- [Privacy](https://touchgrass.rest/privacy): exactly what stays on your Mac
- [AI screen-time tracker for Mac](https://touchgrass.rest/ai-screen-time-tracker-mac): tracking AI time specifically
- [Screen-break reminder](https://touchgrass.rest/screen-break-reminder): the gentle break mechanic
- ["Touch grass" meaning](https://touchgrass.rest/touch-grass-meaning): the phrase, and the app named after it

## Links
- Source code: https://github.com/Deveshb15/touch-grass
- Download (DMG): https://github.com/Deveshb15/touch-grass/releases/latest
